description.ko: 곡면 유리판과 물방울 같은 렌즈가 백색광의 맥동을 빠른 무지개 카우스틱으로 바꾸는 밝은 PRISM-2 굴절의 관입니다.
description.en: A bright PRISM-2 refraction crown where curved glass sheets and droplets turn white light pulses into fast rainbow caustics.

prompt: PRISM-2 chromatic pulse inside a radiant white cloud chamber: a floating optical crown made from ultra-clear glass meniscus sheets, tiny concave mirrorless bowls, and needle-cut diamond droplets is suspended around an invisible pressure wave of white light. Instead of a single beam, the core releases fast crescent-shaped flashes that skim across the curved glass surfaces, refracting into snapped ribbons of #FF0080 magenta, #00FF80 mint green, #8000FF violet, and #FFFF00 yellow. Rainbow caustics appear as airborne splash arcs, scalloped interference marks, and bright prismatic wavelets curling through the chamber, with crisp chromatic aberration tracing every liquid-smooth rim and droplet edge. Bright pure-energy mood, polished optical transparency, sharp internal reflections, low sparse particles only, energetic spectral motion trails, no tabletop arrangement, no dark surface, no traditional triangular prism.
